title: VS A BOT, IN A GOKART RACE!
levelGoal: Build a Go-kart that will beat the bot in a track of curves, straightaways, and surprises.

startingInventory.name: Engineer's Haptic Overalls

startingInventory.descriptionMd: An **AR Visor** that highlights stress points in your build and tracks the bot's progress in the far room.
